_comment: Tibik locale file - English (built-in). Copy this file, rename it to your language code (e.g. de.json), translate the values, and drop it into {configPath}/tibik/strings/ on the device. Keys must stay identical to this file. Missing keys fall back to English automatically.
disclaimer.title: Notice
disclaimer.body1: I am Tibik, an independent mod built on Canvas. I am not a replacement for, nor affiliated with, ThatSkyMod (libTSM) and/or thatgamecompany.
compat.shout_disabled: Shout hooks are disabled because %s was detected.
compat.world_disabled: Teleport hooks are disabled because %s was detected.
compat.access_disabled: Local position tool is disabled because %s was detected.
access.waiting: Waiting for the game world to finish loading...
access.tp_hint: Type coordinates here or use /tp <x> <y> <z> in the in-game chat.
access.ori_drunk_tooltip:
Randomly wobbles your skykid's orientation
with intermittent sober pauses.
access.speed_unavail: Game speed data not available yet
access.cinema_hint: You are not in the Cinema. Video will play but nothing will be visible on-screen. Works for audio-only or radio streams.
access.afk_hook_unavail: AFK hook not available (pattern scan failed)
access.afk_prevent_tooltip:
Resets the idle timer every frame, keeping
your skykid awake (no drowsy pose or zzZ).
access.afk_force_tooltip:
Simulates 125 s of inactivity every frame.
The game fires its native AFK confirm dialog on
the first frame; subsequent frames keep AFK state.
Disabled while Anti-AFK is active.
access.afk_farm_active: Sky won't collect wax while the kid dozes - AFK locked until the run ends.
access.sq_force_claimable_tooltip:
Forces every seasonal-quest button on Carnival Guide, trust-moment
relive, and other spirit-shop nodes to render as ready-to-claim, and
routes taps onto the HTTP submit branch.  The server still arbitrates
whether to honor the claim; off by default.
access.sq_hook_unavail: Button-gate hook unavailable on this build.
access.notif_tooltip:
Plays the noticeHappy chime and shows the message
as a HUD notification. Unknown locKeys are displayed
verbatim. Try <2>...</2> tags for highlighting.
access.broken_neck_tooltip:
Removes the head rotation clamp, allowing the
skykid's head to rotate beyond natural limits.
Visual only - not visible to other players.
access.fpv_tooltip:
First-person view. Places the camera at
the skykid's eye position.
access.skip_meditation_tooltip:
Instantly completes meditation circles (white pads) so
the triggered action (quest, message, race) fires right
away instead of waiting out the ~5s sit animation.
world.w_hint: Tap a destination below or use /w <level_name> in the in-game chat.
candle.waiting_hint: The candle list populates once the level finishes loading.
candle.group_cluster_tooltip:
Show only one candle per nearby group instead of every candle.
Makes the list easier to skim when a level has many candles close together.
candle.bypass_proximity_tooltip:
Bypass the pickup distance check so wax is collected
from any distance the moment a candle is lit.
NOP-patches the game binary (reversible).
candle.all_filtered: All %u slots are disabled and filtered out.
farm.wb_here_tooltip:
Collect all available winged lights in the current level
right now. No candle run, no teleport.
farm.dyes_here_tooltip:
Visit every dye cluster in the current level right now.
No candle run, no teleport - uses whatever butterflies
are already streamed in.
farm.notify_tooltip:
Play the noticeHappy chime and show a HUD notification
when the farm run finishes.
farm.incl_dyes_tooltip:
After the candle run on each level, teleport to every dye
(butterfly) cluster. Dyes are visited after candles so they
have time to fully stream in.
farm.cluster_radius_tooltip:
Candles within this distance of an already-queued anchor are
skipped (first-candle-wins). Set to 0 to visit every candle.
farm.dye_stream_wait_tooltip:
How long to wait after the candle run before visiting dyes.
Butterflies are lazy-streamed; a longer wait means fewer misses
in large levels.
farm.dye_interval_tooltip: Dwell time at each dye cluster before moving to the next.
farm.dye_cluster_radius_tooltip:
Butterflies within this distance of a chosen anchor are skipped.
The game's own pickup radius is 10 u - stay below that to avoid
merging distinct dye spots. 8 u is a safe default.
farm.incl_risky_tooltip:
Include levels tagged risky (e.g. Eden) in Farm All / From Here.
Risky levels can damage your avatar mid-run, trap you in sequence-locked
content, or teleport to places the game treats as first-time reveals.
Off by default.
farm.incl_wb_tooltip:
After the candle run on each level, collect all available
winged lights before moving on.
farm.incl_dark_plants_tooltip:
On each level, burn all live dark plants after the candle run.
Some dark plants release dye butterflies when killed - enable
'Include dyes' to collect those at the same locations.
Burning is server-visible (other players can see it).
farm.completion.common:
Farm done - <2>%d / %d</2> worlds
Run complete - <2>%d / %d</2> worlds
Finished - <2>%d / %d</2> worlds farmed
farm.completion.uncommon:
Nice job - <2>%d / %d</2> worlds harvested
Another day, another <2>%d</2> worlds ✨
Candle stonks ↑ - <2>%d / %d</2>
<2>%d / %d</2> worlds. Not bad for a moth.
farm.completion.rare:
The frogs are pleased. <2>%d / %d</2> worlds.
Ribbit. <2>%d / %d</2>.
Your sky kid looks tired. <2>%d</2> worlds is a lot.
farm.completion.legendary:
You have been successfully <2>banned</2>.
You have 1 new message from <2>Sky Support</2>.
Scheduled <2>maintenance</2> will begin shortly.
I miss you when you're <2>offline</2>.
You're my <2>favorite person</2> in Sky.
A <2>Krill</2> has been assigned as your emotional support creature.
api.desc: The faster alternative to semi-farm. Pulls all candles from Home - no teleporting, no level loading. Higher detection risk, so use sparingly.
api.event_tickets_tooltip:
Auto-collects today's event tickets from every realm.
Restart Sky afterwards to see the new totals.
api.claim_races_tooltip:
Claim today's reward for Sunset Race, Fly Race, and Yeti Race.
Server silently skips races already claimed today.
api.daily_quests_tooltip:
Finishes today's daily quests for you and collects all the rewards.
No need to visit the shrine or actually do the quests yourself.
Server silently skips quests already claimed today.
api.status_done_levels: Done! %u levels collected. Restart Sky to refresh currency.
api.status_done_all: Done! Restart Sky to refresh currency.
api.status_done_event_tickets: Done! Event tickets collected. Restart Sky to refresh currency.
api.status_done_daily_quests: Done! %u/%u daily quests claimed (+%u candles). Restart Sky to refresh currency.
ua.title: Unlock All (free spirit-shop items)
ua.start_tooltip:
Sweeps every free spirit-shop item the server will accept.
Fetches the catalog, topologically sorts by dependency, and
POSTs purchase requests in order.  Items gated by trust tier,
unmet spirit encounters, or inactive events are rejected
server-side (counted as "denied") and skipped.  Takes ~2-3 min.
icons.tooltip:
Opens a detached window listing every registered UI icon.
Click a name to copy it to the clipboard.
icons.title: Icon Browser
icons.asset_error_desc: The Sky game assets aren't reachable via the mod's asset manager. This can happen on unusual launchers or if the game hasn't finished initialising yet.
butterflies.waiting_hint: Butterfly entities stream in as you explore a level.
butterflies.area_hint: Dyes appear in Forest, Wasteland, and other dark-plant areas.
butterflies.none_found: No butterflies found in this level.
butterflies.none_found_dyes: No dyes found in this level.
crab.waiting_hint: Enter an area with crabs to populate this list.
crab.empty: No crabs found in this area.
dark.waiting_hint: The plant list populates once the level finishes loading.
dark.none_found: No dark plants found in this level.
dark.burn_all_tooltip:
Sets all living dark plants to dead HP every frame.
With authority: the engine fires the death sequence and
broadcasts the result to other players next frame.
Without authority: local visual only.
dark.group_view_tooltip: Show one row per plant, or expand to individual branches.
crystals.hint: Red damage crystals (Eye of Eden etc.). Excluded from the Burn-all and Farm-all flows; listed here for inspection.
crystals.none_found: No hazard crystals in this level.
crystals.go_tooltip: Teleports to the crystal - will deal damage on proximity.
avatars.hint: All live entities tracked by the engine. Slot 0 is you, 1-7 are other players in your instance, 8-59 are NPCs/spirits.
pickups.waiting_hint: The pickup list populates once the level finishes loading.
pickups.unsupported: Pickup ESP unavailable on this build.
pickups.unsupported_hint: The pickup-class fingerprint didn't match this game version (0.32.7 or newer required).
pickups.none_found: No live pickups in this level.
wb.waiting_hint: The wings list populates once the level finishes loading.
wb.none_found: No winged lights found in this level.
wb.drop_hint: Scatters wing buffs from your avatar.
wb.drop_unavail: Drop feature not available (pattern not resolved).
dep.none_found: No Eden statues found in this level.
rc.waiting_hint: The memory candle list populates once the level finishes loading.
rc.none_found: No memory candles found in this level.
chat.waiting_hint: Chat populates after entering a level with other players.
chat.cipher_tooltip:
Chat with other Tibik users over an obfuscated channel.
Non-mod players just see gibberish (your "Hi there" shows up as "~E1~Uv gurer").
Other Tibik users decode it automatically.
Opt-in, enable when you need it.
about.author: Author:
about.links_explanation: If Canvas update metadata ever breaks or the repo changes, these links give users a place to verify ownership, find releases, and request support manually.
inbox.body_features:
What's new:
• Daily Quests: claim today's rewards in one tap. No shrine, no quest gameplay.
inbox.body_ps: PS: dw, your inbox isn't haunted - this message is local to the mod, TGC has no idea it exists 😇
auth.title: Auth Export
auth.warning: Sends {user, session} as a JSON POST to a local dev tool. These credentials grant full account control - never share them.
auth.howto: Enter your PC's IP and the tool's listening port.
locale.picker_no_packs: No translation packs available right now.
